services.name: crosswalk-safety-alert
services.description: A microservice processing OSEF Zones data from LiDAR sensors. The processed data includes zone information such as zones definitions and bindings. The service reads a KAFKA stream of OSEF data from LiDAR sensors and produces a KAFKA stream of OSEF Zones data.

required_env_vars.name: CROSSWALK_ZONE
required_env_vars.description: ID or name of the target crosswalk zone. Can be numeric (e.g., '5') or a string (e.g., 'C5_main'). If numeric, it will be compared to the zone_id field of the detection message. If string, it will be compared to the zone_name field. This logic is handled automatically in the engine.

required_env_vars.name: APPROACH_ZONES
required_env_vars.description: Comma-separated list of zone names or zone ids before the crosswalk (approach zones). Example: 'C5_before_1,C5_before_2', or '1,2'. Each entry can be a zone name (string) or a zone id (numeric as string). If numeric, it will be compared to the zone_id field of the detection message. If string, it will be compared to the zone_name field. This logic is handled automatically in the engine.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for object speeds topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume speed messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_IN_ZONE_DETECTION_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for object-in-zone detection topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume detection messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_DEST_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Destination Kafka bootstrap server in the format `host:port`. This is the server to which the service will produce messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
required_env_vars.description: URL of the Schema Registry for Kafka.

optional_env_vars.name: VEHICLE_SPEED_THRESHOLD
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum speed (m/s) allowed for vehicles in approach zones. Default: 5.0 m/s (~18 km/h). Vehicles exceeding this speed will raise a PEDESTRIAN_VEHICLE_APPROACH alert.

optional_env_vars.name: MAKE_MOCK
optional_env_vars.description: If True, publishes random mock crosswalk safety alert messages every 1-2 seconds instead of executing the real logic. Messages are still consumed from topics. Default: False (use real logic).

optional_env_vars.name: MAX_SOURCE_EMPTY_POLLS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum number of empty polls before timing out.

optional_env_vars.name: SOURCE_AUTO_OFFSET_RESET
optional_env_vars.description: Where to start consuming messages if no committed offsets are found. Options are 'earliest' or 'latest'.

optional_env_vars.name: BUCKET_TIME_WINDOW_MS
optional_env_vars.description: Time window in milliseconds for bucket matching. Messages within this window are grouped together for synchronization. Default: 1000ms (1 second).

optional_env_vars.name: BUCKET_MAX_AGE_SECONDS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum age in seconds to keep time buckets before dropping them. Older buckets are discarded to prevent memory buildup. Default: 600 seconds (10 minutes).

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_TOPIC
optional_env_vars.description: Kafka topic for object speed data.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_SCHEMA_VALUE_SUBJECT
optional_env_vars.description: Name of the schema value subject to use for the object speeds topic.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_IN_ZONE_DETECTION_TOPIC
optional_env_vars.description: Kafka topic for object-in-zone detection data.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_IN_ZONE_DETECTION_SCHEMA_VALUE_SUBJECT
optional_env_vars.description: Name of the schema value subject to use for the object-in-zone detection topic.

services.name: flow-alert
services.description: A microservice detecting flow anomalies based on object counts in zones. Monitors object counting data and triggers alerts when counts exceed thresholds. Reads from object-counting Kafka stream and produces flow alert events.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_COUNTING_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for object counting topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume counting messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_DEST_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Destination Kafka bootstrap server in the format `host:port`. This is the server to which the service will produce messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
required_env_vars.description: URL of the Schema Registry for Kafka.

optional_env_vars.name: MAKE_MOCK
optional_env_vars.description: If True, use mock data generation instead of real processing. Default: False.

optional_env_vars.name: THRESHOLD
optional_env_vars.description: Object count threshold that triggers a flow alert. Default: 30.

optional_env_vars.name: ZONES_OF_INTEREST
optional_env_vars.description: List of zone names to keep. If empty, all zones are processed.

optional_env_vars.name: OBJECT_TYPE_FILTER
optional_env_vars.description: List of object types/classes to keep (e.g., CAR, PEDESTRIAN). If empty, all types are processed.

optional_env_vars.name: TIME_INTERVAL
optional_env_vars.description: Time interval in seconds between flow alert messages. Controls how frequently alerts are generated for zone/type combinations.

optional_env_vars.name: MAX_SOURCE_EMPTY_POLLS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum number of empty polls before timing out.

optional_env_vars.name: SOURCE_AUTO_OFFSET_RESET
optional_env_vars.description: Where to start consuming messages if no committed offsets are found. Options are 'earliest' or 'latest'.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_COUNTING_TOPIC
optional_env_vars.description: Kafka topic for object counting data.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_COUNTING_SCHEMA_VALUE_SUBJECT
optional_env_vars.description: Name of the schema value subject to use for the object counting topic.

services.name: lidar-osef-data-streamer
services.description: A microservice for streaming OSEF data from LiDAR sensors. The service reads OSEF blobs from a source, processes them with a specified stride, and streams the processed data to Kafka.

required_env_vars.name: OSEF_SOURCE
required_env_vars.description: Path to osef file or TCP stream. For TCP streams, use the format `tcp://hostname:port`. For files, use absolute path inside container (e.g., /data/recording.osef if mounted via volumes).

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_DEST_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Kafka bootstrap server in the format `host:port`.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
required_env_vars.description: URL of the Schema Registry for Kafka.

optional_env_vars.name: MAKE_MOCK
optional_env_vars.description: If True, enable mock mode that loops OSEF data indefinitely. If OSEF_SOURCE points to an existing file, that file is used as the mock data source. Otherwise, the internal default mock file (data/osef_stream_data.bin) is used. Default: False (use real source).

optional_env_vars.name: STRIDE
optional_env_vars.description: Stride for processing the OSEF stream. Set to 1 to process every blob. Stride of 2 will process every second blob.

services.name: object-counting
services.description: A microservice counting objects within predefined areas over time intervals. Tracks object counts in zones for specified time frames (e.g., 5 minutes). Reads from object-in-zone-detection Kafka stream and produces object counting events.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_IN_ZONE_DETECTION_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for object-in-zone detection topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume detection messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_DEST_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Destination Kafka bootstrap server in the format `host:port`. This is the server to which the service will produce messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
required_env_vars.description: URL of the Schema Registry for Kafka.

optional_env_vars.name: MAKE_MOCK
optional_env_vars.description: If True, use mock data generation instead of real processing. Default: False.

optional_env_vars.name: INTERVAL_DURATION_SECONDS
optional_env_vars.description: Duration of the counting interval in seconds. Default: 300 (5 minutes).

optional_env_vars.name: ZONES_OF_INTEREST
optional_env_vars.description: List of zone names to keep. If empty, all zones are processed.

optional_env_vars.name: OBJECT_TYPE_FILTER
optional_env_vars.description: List of object types/classes to keep (e.g., CAR, PEDESTRIAN). If empty, all types are processed.

optional_env_vars.name: MAX_SOURCE_EMPTY_POLLS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum number of empty polls before timing out.

optional_env_vars.name: SOURCE_AUTO_OFFSET_RESET
optional_env_vars.description: Where to start consuming messages if no committed offsets are found. Options are 'earliest' or 'latest'.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_IN_ZONE_DETECTION_TOPIC
optional_env_vars.description: Kafka topic for object-in-zone detection data.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_IN_ZONE_DETECTION_SCHEMA_VALUE_SUBJECT
optional_env_vars.description: Name of the schema value subject to use for the object-in-zone detection topic.

services.name: object-in-zone-detection
services.description: A microservice processing OSEF Zones data from LiDAR sensors. The processed data includes zone information such as zones definitions and bindings. The service reads a KAFKA stream of OSEF data from LiDAR sensors and produces a KAFKA stream of OSEF Zones data.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_ZONES_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for zones topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECTS_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for objects topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_DEST_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Destination Kafka bootstrap server in the format `host:port`. This is the server to which the service will produce messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
required_env_vars.description: URL of the Schema Registry for Kafka.

optional_env_vars.name: OBJECT_TYPE_FILTER
optional_env_vars.description: List of object class names or IDs (as strings) to keep. Numeric entries are treated as class IDs; non-numeric entries are treated as class names. If empty, all object types are processed.

optional_env_vars.name: ZONES_OF_INTEREST
optional_env_vars.description: List of zone names or IDs (as strings) to keep. Numeric entries are treated as zone IDs; non-numeric entries are treated as zone names. If empty, all zones are processed.

optional_env_vars.name: MAX_SOURCE_EMPTY_POLLS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum number of empty polls before timing out.

optional_env_vars.name: SOURCE_AUTO_OFFSET_RESET
optional_env_vars.description: Where to start consuming messages if no committed offsets are found. Options are 'earliest' or 'latest'.

optional_env_vars.name: STRIDE
optional_env_vars.description: Stride for processing the KAFKA stream of OSEF data. Set to 1 to process every message. Stride of 2 will process every second message.

optional_env_vars.name: BUCKET_TIME_WINDOW_MS
optional_env_vars.description: Time window in milliseconds for bucket matching. Messages within this window are grouped together for synchronization. Default: 1000ms (1 second).

optional_env_vars.name: BUCKET_MAX_AGE_SECONDS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum age in seconds to keep time buckets before dropping them. Older buckets are discarded to prevent memory buildup. Default: 600 seconds (10 minutes).

The service reads a KAFKA stream of OSEF data from LiDAR sensors and produces a KAFKA stream of tracked-object OSEF data.

optional_env_vars.name: MAX_SOURCE_EMPTY_POLLS

optional_env_vars.name: SOURCE_AUTO_OFFSET_RESET

optional_env_vars.name: STRIDE

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER

services.name: overspeed-alert
services.description: A microservice detecting vehicles exceeding speed limits. Monitors vehicle speeds and generates alerts when speed thresholds are exceeded. Reads from object-speeds Kafka stream and produces overspeed alert events.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for object speeds topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume speed messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OSEF_ZONES_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for OSEF zones topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume zone messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_DEST_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Destination Kafka bootstrap server in the format `host:port`. This is the server to which the service will produce messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
required_env_vars.description: URL of the Schema Registry for Kafka.

optional_env_vars.name: MAKE_MOCK
optional_env_vars.description: If True, use mock data generation instead of real processing. Default: False.

optional_env_vars.name: ZONES_OF_INTEREST
optional_env_vars.description: List of zone names to monitor for overspeed alerts. If empty, all zones are monitored.

optional_env_vars.name: SPEED_LIMIT
optional_env_vars.description: Speed limit threshold in m/s (default: 13.89 m/s = 50 km/h).

optional_env_vars.name: MAX_SOURCE_EMPTY_POLLS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum number of empty polls before timing out.

optional_env_vars.name: SOURCE_AUTO_OFFSET_RESET
optional_env_vars.description: Where to start consuming messages if no committed offsets are found. Options are 'earliest' or 'latest'.

optional_env_vars.name: BUCKET_TIME_WINDOW_MS
optional_env_vars.description: Time window in milliseconds for bucket matching. Messages within this window are grouped together for synchronization. Default: 1000ms (1 second).

optional_env_vars.name: BUCKET_MAX_AGE_SECONDS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum age in seconds to keep time buckets before dropping them. Older buckets are discarded to prevent memory buildup. Default: 600 seconds (10 minutes).

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_TOPIC
optional_env_vars.description: Kafka topic for object speed data.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_SCHEMA_VALUE_SUBJECT
optional_env_vars.description: Name of the schema value subject to use for the object speeds topic.

services.name: traffic-jam-alert
services.description: A microservice generating traffic jam alerts (start and stop) for monitored zones. Monitors traffic jam detector events and generates both start and stop alerts for traffic jams. Each jam is assigned a unique ID and tracked from start to stop. Reads from traffic-jam-detector Kafka stream and produces traffic jam alert events.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for traffic jam detection topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume detection messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_DEST_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Destination Kafka bootstrap server in the format `host:port`. This is the server to which the service will produce messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
required_env_vars.description: URL of the Schema Registry for Kafka.

optional_env_vars.name: PATIENCE
optional_env_vars.description: Time in seconds to wait without seeing a traffic jam ID before considering it stopped and generating a STOP alert.

optional_env_vars.name: ZONES_OF_INTEREST
optional_env_vars.description: List of zone IDs or zone names to monitor. Numeric entries are treated as IDs; non-numeric entries as names. If empty, all zones will be monitored.

optional_env_vars.name: ALERT_COOLDOWN_SECONDS
optional_env_vars.description: Minimum time in seconds between consecutive jam alerts for the same zone. Prevents alert spam during prolonged jams. Default: 60 seconds.

optional_env_vars.name: JAM_SEVERITY_THRESHOLD
optional_env_vars.description: Minimum severity level to generate alerts. Options: 'low', 'medium', 'high'. Low: 5+ vehicles, Medium: 10+ vehicles, High: 20+ vehicles. Default: 'medium'.

optional_env_vars.name: MAX_SOURCE_EMPTY_POLLS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum number of empty polls before timing out.

optional_env_vars.name: SOURCE_AUTO_OFFSET_RESET
optional_env_vars.description: Where to start consuming messages if no committed offsets are found. Options are 'earliest' or 'latest'.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_TOPIC
optional_env_vars.description: Kafka topic for traffic jam detection data.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_SCHEMA_VALUE_SUBJECT
optional_env_vars.description: Name of the schema value subject to use for the traffic jam detection topic.

services.name: traffic-jam-detector
services.description: A microservice detecting traffic jams based on vehicle speeds and zone occupancy. Monitors specified zones for low-speed, high-density vehicle patterns. Reads from object-speeds and object-in-zone-detection Kafka streams and produces traffic jam detection events.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for object speeds topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume speed messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_IN_ZONE_DETECTION_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for object-in-zone detection topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume detection messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_DEST_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Destination Kafka bootstrap server in the format `host:port`. This is the server to which the service will produce messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
required_env_vars.description: URL of the Schema Registry for Kafka.

optional_env_vars.name: ZONES_OF_INTEREST
optional_env_vars.description: List of zone names or IDs (as strings) for which to generate mock detections. Numeric entries are treated as IDs; non-numeric entries as names. If empty, defaults to ['zone_1'] for mock data generation.

optional_env_vars.name: JAM_SPEED_THRESHOLD
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum average speed (m/s) to consider as traffic jam. Default: 2.0 m/s (~7 km/h).

optional_env_vars.name: MIN_VEHICLE_COUNT
optional_env_vars.description: Minimum number of vehicles in zone to trigger jam detection. Default: 3 vehicles.

optional_env_vars.name: JAM_DURATION_THRESHOLD_SECONDS
optional_env_vars.description: Minimum duration in seconds that jam conditions must persist before declaring a jam. Prevents false positives from momentary slowdowns. Default: 30 seconds.

optional_env_vars.name: ZONE_COVERAGE_THRESHOLD_PERCENT
optional_env_vars.description: Minimum percentage of zone that must be occupied for jam declaration. Range: 0-100. Default: 50%.

optional_env_vars.name: MAX_SOURCE_EMPTY_POLLS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum number of empty polls before timing out.

optional_env_vars.name: SOURCE_AUTO_OFFSET_RESET
optional_env_vars.description: Where to start consuming messages if no committed offsets are found. Options are 'earliest' or 'latest'.

optional_env_vars.name: BUCKET_TIME_WINDOW_MS
optional_env_vars.description: Time window in milliseconds for bucket matching. Messages within this window are grouped together for synchronization. Default: 1000ms (1 second).

optional_env_vars.name: BUCKET_MAX_AGE_SECONDS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum age in seconds to keep time buckets before dropping them. Older buckets are discarded to prevent memory buildup. Default: 600 seconds (10 minutes).

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_TOPIC
optional_env_vars.description: Kafka topic for object speed data.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_SCHEMA_VALUE_SUBJECT
optional_env_vars.description: Name of the schema value subject to use for the object speeds topic.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_IN_ZONE_DETECTION_TOPIC
optional_env_vars.description: Kafka topic for object-in-zone detection data.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_IN_ZONE_DETECTION_SCHEMA_VALUE_SUBJECT
optional_env_vars.description: Name of the schema value subject to use for the object-in-zone detection topic.

services.name: underspeed-alert
services.description: A microservice detecting vehicles driving too slowly (underspeed). Monitors vehicle speeds and generates alerts when vehicles fall below minimum speed thresholds. Reads from object-speeds Kafka stream and produces underspeed alert events.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for object speeds topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume speed messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OSEF_ZONES_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for OSEF zones topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume zone messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_DEST_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Destination Kafka bootstrap server in the format `host:port`. This is the server to which the service will produce messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
required_env_vars.description: URL of the Schema Registry for Kafka.

optional_env_vars.name: ZONES_OF_INTEREST
optional_env_vars.description: List of zone names or zone IDs (as strings) for which to generate mock alerts. Numeric entries are treated as IDs; non-numeric entries as names. If empty, defaults to ['zone_1'] for mock data generation.

optional_env_vars.name: MIN_SPEED_LIMIT
optional_env_vars.description: Minimum speed threshold in m/s (default: 8.33 m/s = 30 km/h).

optional_env_vars.name: MAX_SOURCE_EMPTY_POLLS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum number of empty polls before timing out.

optional_env_vars.name: SOURCE_AUTO_OFFSET_RESET
optional_env_vars.description: Where to start consuming messages if no committed offsets are found. Options are 'earliest' or 'latest'.

optional_env_vars.name: BUCKET_TIME_WINDOW_MS
optional_env_vars.description: Time window in milliseconds for bucket matching. Messages within this window are grouped together for synchronization. Default: 1000ms (1 second).

optional_env_vars.name: BUCKET_MAX_AGE_SECONDS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum age in seconds to keep time buckets before dropping them. Older buckets are discarded to prevent memory buildup. Default: 600 seconds (10 minutes).

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_TOPIC
optional_env_vars.description: Kafka topic for object speed data.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_OBJECT_SPEEDS_SCHEMA_VALUE_SUBJECT
optional_env_vars.description: Name of the schema value subject to use for the object speeds topic.

services.name: zones-passing
services.description: A microservice tracking objects passing between zones. Monitors zone transitions and records when objects move from one zone to another. Reads from object-in-zone-detection Kafka stream and produces zone passing events.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for object-in-zone detection topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume detection messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_DEST_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Destination Kafka bootstrap server in the format `host:port`. This is the server to which the service will produce messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
required_env_vars.description: URL of the Schema Registry for Kafka.

optional_env_vars.name: MAKE_MOCK
optional_env_vars.description: If True, use mock data generation instead of real processing. Default: False.

optional_env_vars.name: FROM_ZONE
optional_env_vars.description: Filter for the origin zone. If specified, only track transitions FROM this zone. Can be combined with to_zone for exact transition tracking. If both are None, default zone transitions will be generated.

optional_env_vars.name: TO_ZONE
optional_env_vars.description: Filter for the destination zone. If specified, only track transitions TO this zone. Can be combined with from_zone for exact transition tracking. If both are None, default zone transitions will be generated.

optional_env_vars.name: OBJECT_TYPE_FILTER
optional_env_vars.description: List of object types/classes to track (e.g., CAR, PEDESTRIAN). If empty, all types are processed.

optional_env_vars.name: MAX_SOURCE_EMPTY_POLLS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum number of empty polls before timing out.

optional_env_vars.name: SOURCE_AUTO_OFFSET_RESET
optional_env_vars.description: Where to start consuming messages if no committed offsets are found. Options are 'earliest' or 'latest'.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_TOPIC
optional_env_vars.description: Kafka topic for object-in-zone detection data.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_SCHEMA_VALUE_SUBJECT
optional_env_vars.description: Name of the schema value subject to use for the object-in-zone detection topic.

services.name: zones-passing-alert
services.description: A microservice generating alerts for zone passing events. Monitors zone transitions and triggers alerts for specific crossing patterns. Reads from zones-passing Kafka stream and produces zone passing alert events.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Source Kafka bootstrap server for zones passing topic in the format `host:port`. This is the server from which the service will consume zone passing messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_DEST_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER
required_env_vars.description: Destination Kafka bootstrap server in the format `host:port`. This is the server to which the service will produce messages.

required_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
required_env_vars.description: URL of the Schema Registry for Kafka.

optional_env_vars.name: MAKE_MOCK
optional_env_vars.description: If True, use mock data generation instead of real processing. Default: False.

optional_env_vars.name: FROM_ZONE
optional_env_vars.description: Filter for the origin zone that triggers alerts. If specified, only alert on transitions FROM this zone. Can be combined with to_zone for exact transition monitoring. If both are None, default alert transitions will be generated.

optional_env_vars.name: TO_ZONE
optional_env_vars.description: Filter for the destination zone that triggers alerts. If specified, only alert on transitions TO this zone. Can be combined with from_zone for exact transition monitoring. If both are None, default alert transitions will be generated.

optional_env_vars.name: OBJECT_TYPE_FILTER
optional_env_vars.description: List of object types/classes to alert on (e.g., CAR, PEDESTRIAN). If empty, all types are monitored.

optional_env_vars.name: ALERT_SEVERITY
optional_env_vars.description: Severity level for generated alerts (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL).

optional_env_vars.name: MAX_SOURCE_EMPTY_POLLS
optional_env_vars.description: Maximum number of empty polls before timing out.

optional_env_vars.name: SOURCE_AUTO_OFFSET_RESET
optional_env_vars.description: Where to start consuming messages if no committed offsets are found. Options are 'earliest' or 'latest'.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_TOPIC
optional_env_vars.description: Kafka topic for zones passing data.

optional_env_vars.name: KAFKA_SOURCE_SCHEMA_VALUE_SUBJECT
optional_env_vars.description: Name of the schema value subject to use for the zones passing topic.
